title: Break On Through (To the Other Side)
why_this_song: Break On Through (To the Other Side) by The Doors (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "break" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "break" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "through" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "through" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Break On Through (To the Other Side)" was released in 1967. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Break On Through (To the Other Side)" foi lançada em 1967. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Break On Through (To the Other Side)" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Break On Through (To the Other Side)" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Break On Through (To the Other Side)" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Break On Through (To the Other Side)" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Break On Through (To the Other Side)" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Break On Through (To the Other Side)"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.
